name: Tina Smith
subject: Can I ask you something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200228-24?refcode=em200228-24&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") I am about to ask you to add a contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota because we're just 24 hours away from closing the books on our critical end-of-month deadline.

My team and I have set an ambitious goal to raise as much as we can before tomorrow's deadline expires, which means our job between now and then is to collect as many grassroots donations as possible to stay on track for our first quarterly deadline of the year.

It's important you know that everyone -- from Donald Trump to our opponent Jason Lewis to Mitch McConnell and his dark money network -- will see our fundraising numbers at the end of this all-important quarter.

That's why I'm asking:

**Will you add a donation of $10 or more before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow? The more names we get in the door before we head into the final stretch of this quarter, the stronger our campaign will look.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200228-24?refcode=em200228-24&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

I firmly believe one of the best chances we have of taking back the Senate majority is by holding strong right here in Minnesota. But everything can turn on a dime in this race, so we need to build a campaign that can withstand anything the other side throws at us.

Thanks in advance for anything you're willing to chip in.

-- Tina

subject: Hoosiers Lead
body:
If you need someone to lead your organization’s response to an important matter, put a Hoosier in charge. That’s exactly what President Donald Trump.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2656be26e3)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Hoosiers Lead_** If you need someone to lead your organization’s response to an important matter, put a Hoosier in charge. That’s exactly what **President Donald Trump** did this week, when he designated Indiana’s own **Vice President Mike Pence** to lead the federal government’s response to the coronavirus.

That’s because when it comes to leading on challenges in public health, **Vice President Pence** has experience here in Indiana. As our governor in 2014, he led when the nation’s first case of MERS emerged in Indiana. **President Trump** said it well – when it comes to setting a standard for public health, other states look to the Indiana model.

"[Indiana] has a great health care system there -- a system that a lot of the other states have really looked to, and changed their systems. They wanted to base it on the Indiana system,” said **President Trump**.

Today **Vice President Pence** is working with our nation’s top doctors and medical professionals (including fellow Hoosier, Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar) to keep Americans safe from this disease. There continue to be no confirmed cases of the coronavirus in Indiana. Please be assured that the immediate risk still remains low for anyone who doesn’t have any risk factors (like travel to affected areas), and that with **President Trump **and **Vice President Pence** leading the charge, the health and well-being of all Americans will remain the number one priority. \- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
---
| **_Hoosiers & Sports_** Hoosiers love sports, and **Governor Holcomb** is no exception! Sports are a huge part of the fabric of our state. On Thursday night, **Governor Holcomb** attended the Burris Laboratory School vs. Blackford County High School game, and on Friday he did a Q&A about health care with NFL great Archie Manning (Peyton and Eli's dad).
* Everyone knows**Governor Holcomb** loves basketball, and he'll take any opportunity he has to catch a game! It doesn't matter if it's high school, college, the Pacers or the Fever -- he supports all levels of basketball in our state. Did you know **Governor Holcomb** played basketball at Pike High School and has made a basket in each of Indiana’s 92 counties?
* **Governor Holcomb** also did a Q&A session with former NFL quarterback Archie Manning! The event was for Ascension St. Vincent, and gave Indiana business leaders an opportunity to learn more about solving health care challenges in 2020. Among the topics discussed were the importance of preventative care and healthy lifestyles.

Sports play a key part in the lives of Hoosiers, and Governor Holcomb is finding ways to tie important topics in to our love of sports!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Indiana GOP: Now Hiring!_** Are you looking for an opportunity to help your Indiana Republican Party and make a difference in the lives of Hoosiers? We’re now hiring enthusiastic and motivated Republicans to join our grassroots team as field organizers and political interns!

Field Organizers play a critical role in the Indiana Republican Party and the Eric Holcomb for Indiana field efforts, working to build the grassroots infrastructure for Republican success up and down the ballot in 2020. Our political interns are also making a big difference – and gaining experience by getting an inside view of what it takes to run a statewide campaign.

Interested? [Learn more here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a84bcd378&e=1acd9bb3d6), and apply by sending your resume to [info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop)!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Happy Birthday, Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch_** This week, we were excited to celebrate the birthday of Indiana's lieutenant governor, **Suzanne Crouch**! Join us as we wish **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** happy birthday!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Indiana GOP’s Whitley Yates Named “GOP Rising Star”_**
Congratulations to the Indiana Republican Party’s Director of Diversity and Engagement, **Whitley Yates**. The Republican National Committee has nominated her as a “Rising Star” in our party!

As part of this honor, she’s spent a few days this week in Washington, D.C. attending trainings and meeting with staff at the RNC and President Trump’s victory team. This includes meeting with **RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel** and a visit to the White House. Congratulations, **Whitley**!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b7cb16fca&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Join Us at the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention_** The Indiana Republican State Convention will be June 19-20 in Indianapolis. We've updated [our website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82151b3ca3&e=1acd9bb3d6) with information you'll need about state convention, so if you're planning to attend, make sure to check it out. This includes:
* Hotel Room Block: The room block for two downtown hotels is now open! If you plan to stay overnight in Indianapolis, reserve your room now! More info is available [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6a4e37978b&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* Convention Schedule: New this week! Check out the official schedule of events for the two-day convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=973473c104&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* Delegate Fees: If you're in a non-contested race for a delegate spot to this year's convention or if your county chair appoints you to an open delegate spot, you can now pay your delegate fees [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=99e3b27f68&e=1acd9bb3d6).

---
|
---

clean_body: If you need someone to lead your organization’s response to an important matter, put a Hoosier in charge. That’s exactly what President Donald Trump.. | | | | | | | Hoosiers Lead If you need someone to lead your organization’s response to an important matter, put a Hoosier in charge. That’s exactly what President Donald Trump did this week, when he designated Indiana’s own Vice President Mike Pence to lead the federal government’s response to the coronavirus. That’s because when it comes to leading on challenges in public health, Vice President Pence has experience here in Indiana. As our governor in 2014, he led when the nation’s first case of MERS emerged in Indiana. President Trump said it well – when it comes to setting a standard for public health, other states look to the Indiana model. "[Indiana] has a great health care system there -- a system that a lot of the other states have really looked to, and changed their systems. They wanted to base it on the Indiana system,” said President Trump. Today Vice President Pence is working with our nation’s top doctors and medical professionals (including fellow Hoosier, Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar) to keep Americans safe from this disease. There continue to be no confirmed cases of the coronavirus in Indiana. Please be assured that the immediate risk still remains low for anyone who doesn’t have any risk factors (like travel to affected areas), and that with President Trump and Vice President Pence leading the charge, the health and well-being of all Americans will remain the number one priority. \- Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Hoosiers & Sports Hoosiers love sports, and Governor Holcomb is no exception! Sports are a huge part of the fabric of our state. On Thursday night, Governor Holcomb attended the Burris Laboratory School vs. Blackford County High School game, and on Friday he did a Q&A about health care with NFL great Archie Manning (Peyton and Eli's dad). Everyone knowsGovernor Holcomb loves basketball, and he'll take any opportunity he has to catch a game! It doesn't matter if it's high school, college, the Pacers or the Fever -- he supports all levels of basketball in our state. Did you know Governor Holcomb played basketball at Pike High School and has made a basket in each of Indiana’s 92 counties? Governor Holcomb also did a Q&A session with former NFL quarterback Archie Manning! The event was for Ascension St. Vincent, and gave Indiana business leaders an opportunity to learn more about solving health care challenges in 2020. Among the topics discussed were the importance of preventative care and healthy lifestyles. Sports play a key part in the lives of Hoosiers, and Governor Holcomb is finding ways to tie important topics in to our love of sports! | | | Indiana GOP: Now Hiring! Are you looking for an opportunity to help your Indiana Republican Party and make a difference in the lives of Hoosiers? We’re now hiring enthusiastic and motivated Republicans to join our grassroots team as field organizers and political interns! Field Organizers play a critical role in the Indiana Republican Party and the Eric Holcomb for Indiana field efforts, working to build the grassroots infrastructure for Republican success up and down the ballot in 2020. Our political interns are also making a big difference – and gaining experience by getting an inside view of what it takes to run a statewide campaign. Interested? , and apply by sending your resume to mailto:info@indiana.gop! | | | Happy Birthday, Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch This week, we were excited to celebrate the birthday of Indiana's lieutenant governor, Suzanne Crouch! Join us as we wish Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch happy birthday! | | | Indiana GOP’s Whitley Yates Named “GOP Rising Star” Congratulations to the Indiana Republican Party’s Director of Diversity and Engagement, Whitley Yates. The Republican National Committee has nominated her as a “Rising Star” in our party! As part of this honor, she’s spent a few days this week in Washington, D.C. attending trainings and meeting with staff at the RNC and President Trump’s victory team. This includes meeting with RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel and a visit to the White House. Congratulations, Whitley! | | | Join Us at the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention The Indiana Republican State Convention will be June 19-20 in Indianapolis. We've updated with information you'll need about state convention, so if you're planning to attend, make sure to check it out. This includes: Hotel Room Block: The room block for two downtown hotels is now open! If you plan to stay overnight in Indianapolis, reserve your room now! More info is available . Convention Schedule: New this week! Check out the official schedule of events for the two-day convention . Delegate Fees: If you're in a non-contested race for a delegate spot to this year's convention or if your county chair appoints you to an open delegate spot, you can now pay your delegate fees . | | | Upcoming Republican Events : Johnson County Lincoln Day Dinner with Gary Varvel : Vanderburgh County Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Holcomb : Lawrence Township Lincoln Day Dinner with Rep. name: Democratic Membership
subject: Obama knows what's at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team, Republicans are MASSIVELY out-raising Democrats to reelect Donald Trump and force his agenda on Americans across the country.
We thought the news of Trump outraising Democrats would FIRE UP grassroots supporters, but Democrats aren't donating! President Obama knows his legacy is on the line, and he's asking you to get off the sidelines:
[](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTcwMjU4NjIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTgxNjY5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Obama's legacy is in jeopardy, and we can't protect it if we don't have the resources we need to elect Democrats across the country. And right now, with the GOP outraising us, it's looking like we won't.

**To make up ground, we 've set a $50,000 end of month goal, and a concerned group of donors is matching every gift to help us get there.**** ****Team, if we 're going to close this fundraising gap and save Obama's legacy, it is vital that we take advantage of every single dollar of this match. Right now, we're falling well short of the $50,000 we need, and we're at risk of leaving money on the table.**

**Because this is so important, we pulled the supporter records of top Democrats like you, and here 's what we found:**
**Name:** Top Supporter
**Supporter ID:** 8751682
**Given to defeat Trump today? NO**
We know that if we don't close the GOP fundraising gap soon, we'll blow our chances in key races across the country, and we won't be able to stop Trump and his allies from destroying Obama's legacy.
**[_Team, will you stand with Obama and give $1 now to defeat Republicans and elect Democrats across the country? Every dollar you give will have twice the impact._](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTcwMjU4NjIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTgxNjY5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

subject: 3 Reasons Why We Need to Defeat Kendra Horn
disclaimer_text:
paid for by
Michael Bloomberg
body:
|
---
Friend, As we get closer to our election, I don't want us to forget why it's so important we defeat Kendra Horn and finally send her home. Here are 3 reasons why it's so important we win: [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Jnlvy9ja99AsNYi763jeMHZg/vBdxlI5PeoIULFFwW8n7gA) **#1. Kendra Horn wants to take away your guns. ** Kendra Horn believes in radical gun confiscation and wants to leave Oklahomans defenseless. She opposes constitutional carry, supports intrusive background checks, and received a "D" rating by the Gun Owners Association of America. **We can 't trust Kendra to stand for our 2nd Amendment rights and must replace her with a constitutional conservative this fall. ** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Jnlvy9ja99AsNYi763jeMHZg/vBdxlI5PeoIULFFwW8n7gA) **Reason #2: Kendra Horn was bought and paid for by
Michael Bloomberg.** During the Democratic debate this week, liberal elitist Michael Bloomberg admitted he bought and paid for the Democrats' majority in Congress, including Kendra Horn. We can't trust her to respect Oklahoma values while she benefits from contributions from the likes of Michael Bloomberg. **I pledge I will never take a dime from the coastal elites or the D.C. swamp. Instead, I will fight for YOU in Congress.** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Jnlvy9ja99AsNYi763jeMHZg/vBdxlI5PeoIULFFwW8n7gA) **Reason #3: Kendra Horn voted to impeach President Trump** When given the chance to do what's right and push back against Nancy Pelosi's plot to remove President Trump from office, Kendra Horn joined in on the witch hunt. **We can never forget her betrayal to the people of Oklahoma and must replace her. ** Kendra Horn only represents her own liberal agenda in Congress, not the values of Oklahoma's 5th congressional district. **I 'm running for Congress to send her home and take back the seat that was stolen from us in 2018. ** [**Will you help me defeat Kendra Horn by donating $20 or more today?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Jnlvy9ja99AsNYi763jeMHZg/vBdxlI5PeoIULFFwW8n7gA) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Jnlvy9ja99AsNYi763jeMHZg/vBdxlI5PeoIULFFwW8n7gA) Terry Neese

* * *
P.O. Box 12744
Oklahoma City, OK 73157 Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/unsubscribe/Fc6SuitAsKVu8aWro763aKJJCNQw2PIOEJddCxdm6OxFg/baZWteB5n2ZUx9YJTk9kqQ/vBdxlI5PeoIULFFwW8n7gA)

subject: Amazon PAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2AA/ni0YAA/t.2zo/fMvcI3RrQKOM7aqSgaNxxQ/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH7186DBDik-2BNydWAz-2FNtvztyRS9pshYwdmfGZw77RuaINJEAz9SNTxl7jKSlTJkw1gAHAdxrPvSxuvXRhiEmNYt8UeO-2Bk3cUo2P6Ll8hIz7PCxw-3D/9eoK)

Hi Friend, I'm to writing you from Seattle were we are holding a grassroots fundraiser with supporters! The Emerald City is of course the home of Amazon, the world's largest company owned by the world's richest man, Jeff Bezos. And who is Amazon backing in our primary election for Oregon's 04th with a max contribution of $5,000? name: Steve Chabot
subject: A critical moment…
body:
As we wrap up the shortest month of the year, my team informs me we are still short of our End-of-Month fundraising goal. I wouldn’t normally be wor
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhiltudt-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhiltudt-kujkulhluu-r/) Hi there, friend. As we wrap up the shortest month of the year, my team informs me we are still short of our End-of-Month fundraising goal. I wouldn't normally be worried, but this month, I am. Both of my Democratic opponents are already airing television ads distracting from their radical positions in favor of a government takeover of health care and extreme policies like the Green New Deal. [I Don't Support the Democrats' Radical Agenda!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhiltudt-kujkulhluu-y/) Friend, at this critical moment, I need you with me more than ever to fight back against this agenda that is so fundamentally out-of-step with the values of hardworking Ohio families.**Will you chip-in now to ensure we meet this BIG deadline? We 're about $3,500 short, but with your support we can surpass our goal and be well-positioned to take the fight to our opponents.** [Rush END OF MONTH DONATION](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhiltudt-kujkulhluu-j/) I really appreciate your support, by pulling together, we can keep this seat in the hands of a leader focused on delivering common sense results for Ohio.Thank you,Steve Chabot | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhiltudt-kujkulhluu-t/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhiltudt-kujkulhluu-i/)

name: Tina Ramirez
subject: Need Your Help With Two Things 🙏🏻
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:
Can I Count On You?
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
| | | Friend, I am not taking this campaign lightly. Team Ramirez hit the ground running in 2020, and _we are spending each and every day_ _ talking with voters in _**EVERY**_ corner of of the 7th District, ensuring they know exactly what's at stake on Election Day_. While we are still months away from our Primary Election, the hefty costs associated with television, radio, and digital ads are looming right around the corner. In that regard... [**_I Need Your Immediate Help With Two Things_.**](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtuhhdd-udthdyhkil-i/) [_**First, Will You Stand With Me And Help Our Campaign Reach Our End Of Month Fundraising Goal?**_](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtuhhdd-udthdyhkil-d/)
---
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtuhhdd-udthdyhkil-h/)
[_I hope you will consider making a donation of $25, $50, $100 or more right now to help ensure we are able to spread our campaign message to**EVERY** corner of the district_](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtuhhdd-udthdyhkil-k/). _**Second, For Those Of You Attending The 2020 Seventh District Convention On The Behalf Of Team Ramirez, There Are TWO MORE Opportunities To Drop Off Your Delegate Forms.**_
---
Friend, you know I did not make the decision to enter this race lightly. **As a conservative, single mother, and someone who has devoted their entire career to fighting for freedom and prosperity** \- _**I’m more confident than ever that our district needs a change in leadership**_. I know this won't be easy, _but the things worth fighting for rarely are_. Thank you for your prayers and advice during the course of this campaign. I know, together, we can make a difference for our children and grandchildren's future! Sincerely, Tina Ramirez
Conservative Candidate for Congress
VA-07
---

name: Sara
subject: Four days until your hard work pays off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friend, As we head into the final weekend before the primary, I want you to check out one of our ads about why I'm running for Congress.

| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791b/27c6da69/2b3bc062/12f0956/3128186558/VEsH/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200228-1-EM&amount=1")
---
Friend,

As we head into the final weekend before the primary, I want you to check out one of our ads about why I'm running for Congress.
[](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791b/27c6da69/2b3bc062/12f0956/3128186558/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200228-1-EM&amount=1")
| [WATCH THE AD ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791b/27c6da69/2b3bc062/12f0956/3128186558/VEsF/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200228-1-EM&amount=1")
---
Rising health care costs, climate change, and gun violence are just some of the challenges facing Americans. And young people will ultimately pay the price for inaction. It's time for a new generation of leadership in Congress who will work with anyone to find solutions.

There are just four days left until the primary, and I need your help reaching the finish line.

[_**Please contribute $1 or $4 today so we have the resources we need to win on Tuesday.**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791b/27c6da69/2b3bc062/12f0956/3128186558/VEsC/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200228-1-EM&amount=1")

Thank you,

Sara

* * *
| | [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791b/27c6da69/2b3bc062/12f0957/3128186558/VEsD/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-button&recurring=true&amount=25")

---

Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs is running for Congress in California's 53rd Congressional District. In Congress, she will fight for policies to address climate change, guarantee health care as a human right, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, and defend access to reproductive care. Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! _[You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791b/27c6da69/2b3bc062/12f0958/3128186558/VEsA/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")_

---
Team,

Becca, my finance director, just texted me an update that we're almost to our February goal!

As she said, this is no ordinary goal. The primary is on Tuesday, early voting has begun, and we don't have a moment to spare. We're knocking on doors across the district, texting voters, and showing up at the polls to make sure that everyone who can vote does vote.

So we've got to hit this goal and finish out strong to avoid a runoff election and a waste of resources.

**[Listen, I don't take corporate PAC money because I want to serve voters and our communities, not corporations and special interests, so I need your support to win this primary.](https://act.myngp.com/el/hMm6lvMvjdUK-FodkucrkYxDHacrLyhNFshY9lRrxms=/m9AUvoZ800r2DisWitECvd-yJfphkIFzi3a07thDC9c=?refcode=20200229AM&amount=25&recurring=1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/hMm6lvMvjdUK-FodkucrkYxDHacrLyhNFshY9lRrxms=/m9AUvoZ800r2DisWitECvd-yJfphkIFzi3a07thDC9c=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20200229AM)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/hMm6lvMvjdUK-FodkucrkYxDHacrLyhNFshY9lRrxms=/m9AUvoZ800r2DisWitECvd-yJfphkIFzi3a07thDC9c=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200229AM)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/hMm6lvMvjdUK-FodkucrkYxDHacrLyhNFshY9lRrxms=/m9AUvoZ800r2DisWitECvd-yJfphkIFzi3a07thDC9c=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200229AM)** **[Chip in: $150](https://act.myngp.com/el/hMm6lvMvjdUK-FodkucrkYxDHacrLyhNFshY9lRrxms=/m9AUvoZ800r2DisWitECvd-yJfphkIFzi3a07thDC9c=?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=20200229AM)** **[Chip in: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/hMm6lvMvjdUK-FodkucrkYxDHacrLyhNFshY9lRrxms=/m9AUvoZ800r2DisWitECvd-yJfphkIFzi3a07thDC9c=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=20200229AM)** **[Or, chip in another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/hMm6lvMvjdUK-FodkucrkYxDHacrLyhNFshY9lRrxms=/m9AUvoZ800r2DisWitECvd-yJfphkIFzi3a07thDC9c=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200229AM)** I'm fighting for our communities -- for access to good health care and schools, for better treatment for our veterans, for our environment, and for a better criminal justice system.

Thank you for your continued support and for helping to push for a brighter future for all.

The first quarter deadline of the year is QUICKLY approaching and I have to be honest with you: **we 're behind our fundraising goal.** We did some quick number crunching and found that **if we can get 4 donors from Sturgeon Lake to make a donation through the Political Contribution Refund program by midnight, we 'll be able to close the gap.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fALb8G2S6CQHlYDW463dGBX6HnpBBhUisApJIGWXric=/daGRCWGLAvLUguzxE06tFnkMlHSUEKgM-Gg9dSdrZuM=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=022920EOM3) [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fALb8G2S6CQHlYDW463dGBX6HnpBBhUisApJIGWXric=/daGRCWGLAvLUguzxE06tFnkMlHSUEKgM-Gg9dSdrZuM=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=022920EOM3) [**Other Amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fALb8G2S6CQHlYDW463dGBX6HnpBBhUisApJIGWXric=/daGRCWGLAvLUguzxE06tFnkMlHSUEKgM-Gg9dSdrZuM=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=022920EOM3) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ How does it work? Dear Friend, An article in The Economist a couple of days ago opened with this sentence - "In public health, honesty is worth a lot more than hope." Or, I might add - hype. Or gaslighting. We need a unified, apolitical, proportional response to the threat posed by the corona virus based on what we know, acknowledging that we must act before we have all the facts in hand. Unfortunately, we're already seeing divisive rhetoric and finger pointing from our elected officials and the media. I'd like to remind them that a humming economy and record low unemployment isn't the only path to re-election. Decisive leadership in a time of crisis will get you there as well. It's time to listen to our public health experts and act on their recommendations. It's time to take steps to minimize the potential human and economic toll of this event. We must do more than hope these protections are put in place \- we must demand it. It's the last day of the month and I'm asking for your help to reach our goal. We have knocked on nearly 40,000 doors — far beyond what any Democrat has done in a TX-10 primary in the last 20 years. We aren’t relying on SuperPACs or big-time TV consultants. Now every Democratic group in this district has put their trust in us — to finish the job. = = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

body:
Teresa for Senate 2020 Georgia Election Fund
February Deadline: MIDNIGHT
Your Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Most Recent Contribution: N/A
Suggested Action: Donate
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gumption?refcode=em022920-1&refcode2=dac45d79-115b-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true

Friend,
There isn’t much time before my midnight fundraising deadline, so I’ll keep this quick.
Georgia’s Senate primary is less than three months away. That’s less than three months to organize locally and get our message out to each of Georgia’s 159 counties as well as build a war chest that can stand up to Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump’s attacks. They are preparing to spend tens of millions of dollars to stop us from flipping Georgia blue in order to protect the GOP Senate Majority and we need to be ready.
That’s why we can’t wait until a week or two before the primary to raise money. I don’t have corporations dumping money into political action committees as my Republican opponent does.
I’m counting on supporters like you, in Georgia and across the country, to close the three-point gap in our race and help flip the Senate.
Can I count on you to pitch in before our midnight deadline and help us flip this seat from red to blue? Every donation helps us close that gap.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Teresa for Senate 2020 Georgia Election Fund February Deadline: MIDNIGHT Your Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Most Recent Contribution: N/A Suggested Action: Donate Friend, There isn’t much time before my midnight fundraising deadline, so I’ll keep this quick. Georgia’s Senate primary is less than three months away. That’s less than three months to organize locally and get our message out to each of Georgia’s 159 counties as well as build a war chest that can stand up to Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump’s attacks. They are preparing to spend tens of millions of dollars to stop us from flipping Georgia blue in order to protect the GOP Senate Majority and we need to be ready. That’s why we can’t wait until a week or two before the primary to raise money. I don’t have corporations dumping money into political action committees as my Republican opponent does. I’m counting on supporters like you, in Georgia and across the country, to close the three-point gap in our race and help flip the Senate. Can I count on you to pitch in before our midnight deadline and help us flip this seat from red to blue? Every donation helps us close that gap. If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, Teresa PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. \------Forwarded Message------ Subject: I am quitting... From: Matt Gaetz Date: Thursday, February 27, 2020 at 5:48 PM

Patriots -
Today I announced that I will no longer take money from federal PACs - the deepest swamp in Washington.
I am the ONLY returning Republican to make this pledge. For too long, federal PACs have had a stranglehold over our government and too many "conservatives" are nothing more than mouthpieces for special interest groups. Polluters should not set environmental standards. Insurance companies shouldn't get special rules to cheat policyholders. Big Tech should not be allowed to define debate in our country as they buy off Congress - but they do.
---

From this point forward, I will be funded only by Patriots like you! I am going to need your help to take on the special interests and PACs that will surely want to take me out.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Patriot, Did you hear the news that Matt will no longer be taking federal PAC money? We are fed up with the Washington Swamp putting their interests above those of the American people, so together we are fighting back! | == | == and return power back to the American people. | | | == | Now more than ever, we need your support. Matt has a target on his back for being the only Republican to make this no-PAC pledge. If we're unable to raise enough money, the Swamp will swallow up Matt and the special interests will win. | | | == | Thank you! Team Gaetz \------Forwarded Message------ Subject: I am quitting... From: Matt Gaetz Date: Thursday, February 27, 2020 at 5:48 PM Patriots - Today I announced that I will no longer take money from federal PACs - the deepest swamp in Washington. I am the ONLY returning Republican to make this pledge. For too long, federal PACs have had a stranglehold over our government and too many "conservatives" are nothing more than mouthpieces for special interest groups. Polluters should not set environmental standards. Insurance companies shouldn't get special rules to cheat policyholders. Big Tech should not be allowed to define debate in our country as they buy off Congress - but they do. | == | Go beyond the hype of the moment and fight to defeat the swamp monsters that auction off your freedoms and seek to rob you of your liberty. From this point forward, I will be funded only by Patriots like you! I am going to need your help to take on the special interests and PACs that will surely want to take me out. | | | == | I am not afraid to speak truth to power, but I need you by my side. Donate now to take on the Swamp and help me drain it. | | | == | God bless America, | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2020 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Ester, FL 32569 | | Sent by mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com

* **FIRST** : Today is the last day of February. That means it’s a big fundraising deadline for Josh’s campaign — a huge one, really.
* **Unfortunately** : Our opponent, Andy Barr, is a well-funded, Washington politician who has shown us that he’s willing to win by any means necessary. He’ll take anonymous PAC money. He’ll use taxpayer dollars to send around expensive, misleading campaign mail pieces. Yikes.
* **But** : That’s not how Josh operates. Which means that if we’re going to raise enough money to keep up with Barr’s war chest, we’re counting on you!

What do you say — [_**can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today to help Josh win this November? There’s so much riding on Josh’s campaign, friends. Getting corruption out of Washington. Driving down the cost of health care. Protecting public employees. The list goes on.
But most of all, Josh’s campaign is about **you** — talking to you, listening to you, and working for you.
He knows as well as you do that both parties, Democrats and Republicans, tend to send rich folks or political insiders to Washington.
And he knows that Congress ought to have a few more members who understand what it’s like to have a bit of dirt under your fingernails.
We don’t have Andy Barr’s corporate PAC money to win this race. But we have you. **And if we’re going to send Josh to Washington to represent us and fight for the day-to-day well-being of living, breathing, working Kentuckians, we need your help.**
[_**Can you make your first contribution of $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today? We need it if we’re going to finish our February fundraising strong and keep pace with Andy Barr’s dark money.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15564781/164348326/340325994?refcode=20200229_em_fr_eom4_non_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2Y0YWExNS0xYjViLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4KfKnVG7PUkUzCCLhCBlqR_qC2WDuv94VN2Id4Agmw=)
Josh isn’t running for Congress to become a career politician. He’s running because there aren’t enough people with stories like his who make it to Washington.
And if we support him, we’ll get him there.
Thanks for your help today,
Your friends on Josh’s finance team

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: LET'S SEPARATE FACT FROM FICTION
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dear Peter :

There’s a lot of talk about “movements” in politics these days. At a recent event in my district a resident asked me, “We hear so much about the progressive ‘movement’ and some of their radical ideas. When are mainstream, commonsense Democrats going to have a movement of their own?”

That’s a great question. And I have a great answer: Come Join Team Lipinski .

I am a problem solver with a demonstrated record of bringing people together around workable solutions to lower healthcare costs, grow American jobs, protect our communities, and improve transportation, all without outrageous tax increases. I don’t follow a ‘movement’ in Washington – I lead on programs, policies, and funding that will bring tangible results to improve the lives of the residents of my district.

My opponent in this race -- backed by far-left extremists -- embraces a radical agenda that we cannot afford. Her ‘movement’ may be in fashion with the elite, but it is out of touch with the hard-working residents of Illinois’ Third District.

There are less than 50 days until election day on March 17, and I hope you will consider joining Team Lipinski in the fight to reclaim our Democratic Party as the party the represents the priorities and values of hard-working families who need a steady, reliable, commonsense advocate to fight for them each and every day in the halls of Congress.

As we approach our end of month fundraising deadline, I hope that you will consider a donation big or small to help our ‘movement’ make a real statement in this election.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-website-button?refcode=website&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-website-button?refcode=website&amount=20]

P.S. Get on the ground with Team Lipinski this weekend! Please join us as we march in the Chinese Lunar New Year parade this Sunday, Feb. 2, at 1 p.m. The parade kicks off at 24th and Wentworth.

Thank you for your ongoing support.

Dan

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f0e3ca52-145b-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74/b224fb2e-1b5b-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjI0ZmIyZS0xYjViLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cb3sJudBdmVy2XuHFLKClKQYedRFFuQh-lCrQSC_ias=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

body:

Peter, there are just two days left until the primary election.

With so many candidates on the ballot this year, it is very likely that we'll go into a runoff election in just three days. We don't know who we'll be up against, but we do know that Senator Cornyn and his allies don't want MJ coming out of the runoff.

**And evidence suggests they 'll take action to stop her. Make a matched donation right now so we can be prepared for a wave of outside spending after the primary: **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5 ($10 value)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890519/7f51f7bc/4d8aab8b/4ef1958a/914115000/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200229.1nd__988__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10 ($20 value)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890519/7f51f7bc/4d8aab8b/4ef19589/914115000/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200229.1nd__988__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25 ($50 value)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890519/7f51f7bc/4d8aab8b/4ef19588/914115000/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200229.1nd__988__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50 ($100 value)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890519/7f51f7bc/4d8aab8b/4ef1958f/914115000/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200229.1nd__988__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890519/7f51f7bc/4d8aab8b/4ef1958e/914115000/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.1nd__988__")**
Mitch McConnell's cronies are already attempting to influence the Democratic primary in North Carolina. A McConnell-aligned super PAC has spent more than $3 million to boost a candidate who had less than $130,000 in the bank. It happened there, and **_[we'd put money on them trying it here in Texas.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890519/7f51f7bc/4d8aab8b/4ef1958b/914115000/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.1nd__988__&amount=10&recurring=true")_**

_Roll Call_ ranked Sen. Cornyn one of the top ten most vulnerable incumbents. His special interest allies are going to look to bail him out, and they know MJ is his biggest threat. **[We need to be prepared, so we're asking you to make a matched donation right now >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890519/7f51f7bc/4d8aab8b/4ef1958b/914115000/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.1nd__988__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We have a primary to get through first, but we wanted to be completely straight with you so we're prepared -- **the runoff is going to be expensive.** They know we're coming, and they're going to do everything they can to stop MJ. We're counting on your help to fight back.

We're in this together, Peter, and we're glad you're with us.

\-- Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890519/7f51f7bc/4d8aab8b/4ef1958b/914115000/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.1nd__988__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Mark Warner
subject: Stop the attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This week, my Republican colleagues introduced two bills to further their attack on Roe v. Wade.
---
| | Derek --

This week, my Republican colleagues introduced two bills to further their attack on Roe v. Wade.

While legislation to expand voter access and ensure the integrity of our elections, address the pressing threat of climate change, and prohibit discrimination on the basis of sex are gathering dust, attacks on reproductive rights continue. These bills would chip away at reproductive freedom -- and one would even criminalize doctors. Americans deserve a Senate that will vote on the issues that impact our communities, and the legislative schedule should never be used as a partisan weapon.

Let me be frank: these bills were a political stunt, not legislation that would actually improve health care for Americans.

Choices about pregnancy and reproductive health care are deeply personal. I'm the father of three daughters, and I've always trusted women to make choices governing their own bodies. That's why I voted against these anti-choice bills in the Senate. I will always protect reproductive rights and defend against any attacks to chip away at those rights.

To stop these attacks, we've got to flip the Senate majority and replace President Trump with someone who will restore choice and dignity to patients. That's why a generous group of donors is matching all gifts to my campaign up to $11,000, until midnight.

I know you've heard from my team a lot this week, and I am so grateful for your support. I'm ready to keep fighting. **[Can I count you in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5cb/53d9897e/530454cc/1c8987c4/3039869236/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-roevwadedouble?refcode=20200229_f_1_nd__493__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

-- Mark Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5cb/53d9897e/530454cc/1c8987c3/3039869236/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-roevwadedouble?refcode=20200229_f_1_nd__493__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Defeat Chabot 2020
subject: Choices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce53/30a4f917/50b084ff/28cd6bda/888091330/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1")

| | When it comes to the future of our country, we have some big choices to make. Every day, we make hundreds of choices -- whether it's what to have for breakfast, where to get our news, or what to wear. Those are small choices. But when it comes to the future of our country -- we have some much bigger choices to make. Take Nikki Foster's campaign for Congress, for example: If you want to keep yet another member of Congress who's funded by the Koch Brothers, then Steve Chabot is exactly your guy. [**But if you want a member of Congress who refuses corporate PAC money and ONLY listens to their constituents, then we need you to make a donation to Nikki 's campaign.**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_febeom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+But+if+you+want+a+member+of+Congress+who&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1") If you are just fine with members of Congress spewing hateful rhetoric and political parties calling their opponents "socialist losers," you should be just fine with Steve Chabot. [**But if you want someone representing you who wants to discuss the issues facing Ohio families and make compromises to get the hard work done, we need you to make a donation to Nikki 's campaign.**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_febeom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+But+if+you+want+someone+representing+you&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1") If you like political scandals and corrupt campaigns where there are errors, accusations of nepotism, and large sums of money gone missing, you'll love Steve Chabot. [**But if you want integrity in your elected officials, someone who is a good steward and public servant, we need you to make a donation to Nikki 's campaign.**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_febeom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+But+if+you+want+integrity+in+your+electe&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1") As you can see, there are a lot of choices for us to make. But whether or not we hit our $5,000 end-of-month goal will have a huge impact on the choices we have to make in this campaign going forward. **We 'll hope you'll choose to stand with us, friend:** | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_febeom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200229_FebEOM2_U2_X1")

body:
Our average contribution is about $31 bucks. Based on the number of donations we need, if we can get two people from your area, we’ll hit the goal.
#
We’re so close to hitting our end of month deadline goal.
Here’s the deal. Our average contribution is about $31 bucks. Based on the number of donations we need, if we can get two people from your ZIP code to contribute right now, we will hit that goal.
[**Can you be one of the two donors we need in your area? # We'll leap to the point
The **great news**. When our team emailed you last week, we were ~~$10,873~~ short of our goal for February, and only two days later we were _~~$2,452~~_ short of our goal for February.

The 28 days of February have come to an end, and we've reached our goal!

We weren't going to celebrate Leap Day, but we decided to jump on the bandwagon. _**Every dollar we raise today goes directly to our student effort. That means more phone calls, more doors knocked, and more parades. **_

Will you contribute [$100, $50, or even $29 to help us out?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e441a8bba9&e=1050d051da) This will do more for the effort to elect Jake LaTurner to Congress than you know.
---

name: Maria
subject: he’s done it again...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |
body:
I can’t believe I have to say this but he’s done it again... Hey, Peter.
Earlier this week I had to call out Bernie Sanders on **[video](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=e40899849273495b981b733debbb2839&_e=UlJnAxb44DfkTG7pN9HXz2ajOupYQQFckkZ3cLMqfcIrXnJ3qvBPPvKCtkJb6y1hH89UmUvGoI0bEk-qrBtaXyfeEFXKHldHskFYrWG1cBHTPB8fq2gaQa-lWaTYBlZozg1_MBY0sqmyfYnqjZ05IHA2v-KCVpUFO7nFL3_N966-5GbeLXbd-uU1xSzkWeEeWBM9gePq-M3nmKaB7SYwnaQ_YidadGijg2PVC7kqMSImrCRGvJFsKr88VDM7a2rnYO53Qjhrm9TvjBZpK2P2nrInF9b6e1nxTON1sFILkSltMUO1lK-K05jpPARKGd-SKjTHBXGzaF4v-WE5HJniAPRXBpqjjAo_YKOrjhtHAXM6xskZWmXoXkX2Zhh0Lv1qYvcVc-X-Ohl0tKsoj5qtJM2mqKVAR3kSTT9cT7OQCsE%3D)** for his dangerous rhetoric and his praise of socialist dictators.
_I can’t believe I have to say this but he’s done it again. _
Bernie not only doubled down on his Fidel Castro comments but now he is praising the Chinese Communist Party. **We can’t allow a man so willing to defend communist regimes to continue pushing his socialist platform in the United States.**
**[That’s why I am personally reaching out to you today, Peter, we’re SO CLOSE to our End of Month goal and I need YOUR support to meet it!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=e40899849273495b981b733debbb2839&_e=UlJnAxb44DfkTG7pN9HXz2ajOupYQQFckkZ3cLMqfcIrXnJ3qvBPPvKCtkJb6y1hH89UmUvGoI0bEk-qrBtaXyfeEFXKHldHskFYrWG1cBHTPB8fq2gaQa-lWaTYBlZozg1_MBY0sqmyfYnqjZ05IHA2v-KCVpUFO7nFL3_N966-5GbeLXbd-uU1xSzkWeEeWBM9gePq-M3nmKaB7SYwnaKh3iCK53kKbvgx0EDET7Xgmvu_CMIwOun6moJwYaZJj6-DA8cDysE-4BdAAzSO2VxMmJSXLFVJGtrHZy2rKiy75sYN1yr1l1hwK_Io2G8eLVLoktjSroA-M_nmMyowzNc0xyW6VBJW2nAu5iMGU-VWljm5oK_IvM1KJErvxcGDKouB0uFGhamngULzy4_Eih0F-Gao0AzWjH5qeL47WaU%3D)** | |

It’s the other way around, it’s the other way around and worst of all Mr. Sanders you know it!” Maria is taking a stand, for YOU friend, against the wave of IMPENDING socialism coming from the Democratic party. | Impending End of Month Fundraising Deadline February Goal:$15,000.00 Current:$7,254.37 Deadline:February 29th @ 11:59 P.M. | | ---|---|--- | With YOUR generous support, we will unseat Donna Shalala and give the people of South Florida a representative who will ALWAYS stand strong against socialist dictators and politicians! Thank you, Team Maria Elvira Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.I'm a new Text block ready for your content. | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | 824 S. name: Donald
subject: 3 days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pierce Bush for Congress
body:
Hello peter,

We're now three days away from the primary, and we're working to turn out people who did not participate in Early Voting.

But I need to ask you a favor—if you can, please make a donation to our campaign by **midnight**. I'm hoping we can reach our fundraising goal today, so we can keep our GOTV program going - with your contribution of just $10 or $20 we can get there.

[https://secure.winred.com/piercebush/end-of-month-final](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=66d1fe9a424241dcaeced125543c13e8&_m=77464534ef1e4786a14c8dbc62021cec&_e=0WyNbrn_QGpNNmKEKV3zlVk7rUsp6wRCDWNe7Nmutr4Ot8PqQaugvYWZmoCA9tvBHxasH5vI4BmfW-Lo0zE_WO5KM_K-GdydW5WwO6-D4n-_j4I3wCZX2L1vzn9ZSohHtTJ-Lh1J7bBqjS3CJi6YHEhH1ngwWnLMv8wPvgJmCXw_QIoYF0TUPBKfXuZzMRn72_H697PHDAMokJuBJL0AULpBwDFMzpWyq1nOqo-w0TI_PtnMpuqeONWkHdy9_XEoZLup6bUOXjTHuVGsjzvpUsLXVd6KaGlHLzwe7jDfx_0%3D)

Pierce is working tirelessly to get his conservative message out to voters, but he needs us behind him all the way. If you can, please donate and share this link with your friends, family, Twitter followers, whomever. Please ask them to donate **before midnight**.

Thank you,

Donald
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Pierce Bush for Congress
---
If you would like to be removed from this list, [please notify us here](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66d1fe9a424241dcaeced125543c13e8&_s=77464534ef1e4786a14c8dbc62021cec&_t=WqpDGwjLxUsIZ_yxZwq_mIrKUwJeQ1JRyqATDuI3wsowBHUX5ZwaHcIgK5ety6RI33pRWKzbIy3WlQOCNWzCWxPwdKSmYX6K_hzw3RV3eTp0FJWcgHnY2lbUvsYxpUXWnaApuwkPrJzUw22TW8nOzSjQWh1iaxRpYVz33pywl5I%3D).

body:
You won’t believe this! I just got word that our opponent received an individual donation from just 6 KENTUCKIANS in 2019. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b190a9dd005c/exclusive-new-ad-alert-6359183?e=5ac6ff05c3)
---
| | Good Saturday morning! I just wanted to make sure you had seen my email below. We are just 3 donors away from our goal. [Can you chip in $6 now to make sure we reach the goal?](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=3a18465f7c&e=5ac6ff05c3) Thank you! - Todd
Begin forwarded message:

From: Todd McMurtry
Date: February 28, 2020 at 8:16:32 AM EST
Subject: You won’t believe this!
---
|
---
| | You won’t believe this! I just got word that our opponent received an individual donation from just _**6 KENTUCKIANS**_ in 2019. Can you help us show him our hometown support? <<[YES, I’M IN](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=87ad553f7c&e=5ac6ff05c3)>>

Sadly, our opponent has been more focused on collecting out-of-state cash than earning the support of our friends and neighbors. Perhaps that explains why he blocked President Trump’s attempt to repeal Obamacare or why he’s failed to prioritize constituent services in the way Geoff Davis and Jim Bunning did. Simply put, he doesn’t support Kentucky - and Kentucky isn’t supporting him.

So, here’s what we’re doing about it. I’m trying to get 24 people to [donate just $6](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=e216486104&e=5ac6ff05c3) during the last two days of February. Donating is simple. Just click the button below and make the purchase.
---

| Thanks in advance for helping us show our grassroots support! All the best,
_**Todd McMurtry**_ P.S. It is critical that we show our growing support. [Please consider a $6 contribution today!](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=054a33d05c&e=5ac6ff05c3)

Hey — did you catch Natalie’s email? We need to make sure we’re reaching as many voters as possible ahead of Super Tuesday and every donation we receive helps us keep our volunteers on the phone.
[**Can you chip in $100 right now to help us reach an additional 4,000 voters in a Super Tuesday state near you?** ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYKddgca-4MowKnzOk-wNy8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200229_frs&n=2)

\---- forwarded message -----
Hey — Wanted to give you a quick campaign update ahead of the weekend. Our Super Tuesday Get Out The Vote efforts are in full swing and we need your help.
We need folks like you to help us reach voters in key states to make sure they are voting for Bill on Tuesday. [**Can you help out GOTV efforts today by jumping on the phone to help us reach our supporters?**](mailto:volunteer@weld2020.org?subject=i%20woul%20like%20to%20phonebank=Hi%20)
| [PHONE BANK →](mailto:volunteer@weld2020.org?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20phonebank)
---
Can’t jump on the phone? [**No worries, you can still help us by making a contribution to our campaign to keep our volunteers on the phone.** ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYKddgca-4MowKnzOk-wNy8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200229_frs&n=4)

[**Do you think you could rush a contribution now so that we can keep our phone bankers going?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYKddgca-4MowKnzOk-wNy8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200229_frs&n=5)

**FIRST:** Conservatives finally beat the impeachment sham when the Senate voted to find President Trump NOT GUILTY on both articles of impeachment.

| | Peter --

This is it. We have hours left until the deadline for our February goal, and it's crucial that we make this one. It's our last goal before the primary, and we need to hit the ground running going into the next stage of our campaign. **[Can we count on your help to reach our goal by midnight?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902e0/7f51f7bc/4d8f1b50/4ef198b1/3847494413/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk5MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.2nd__990__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

As we count down the hours until our deadline, I wanted to let you in on some pretty cool numbers:
1. We've had **more than 76,000 donations** to this campaign. Every donation is a decision someone made to step off the sidelines. **[Will you join them?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902e0/7f51f7bc/4d8f1b50/4ef198b1/3847494413/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk5MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.2nd__990__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
2. Our average online donation last quarter was $22, and 90% of donations were **under $100.** Folks like you and me chipped in whatever they could whenever they could, and it all added up to make a big difference.
3. **[Right now donations are being matched -- so give now and you'll have 2X the impact!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902e0/7f51f7bc/4d8f1b50/4ef198b1/3847494413/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk5MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.2nd__990__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We've hit **EVERY** goal that we've set -- and we're _so_ close to hitting tonight's too. With your help, **[we can reach our goal before midnight.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902e0/7f51f7bc/4d8f1b50/4ef198b1/3847494413/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk5MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.2nd__990__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

---
| |
---
| | Hi friend,

THREE DAYS.

**In just three days you have a chance to fight back.**

The socialist Democrats have tried to un-do your vote in 2016 – they have tried everything in their power to un-elect Donald Trump as President.

They claimed collusion with Russia, they carried out a witch-hunt impeachment, they continue to promote society-destroying policies, and they keep blocking conservative legislation in the House of Representatives.

They simply cannot stand that **under President Trump’s leadership, we have killed terrorists, created jobs, raised wages, enacted fair trade deals, secured our borders, and protected the innocent unborn.**

You get to **fight back** against the Democrats this Tuesday on Primary Election Day by voting for Donald Trump and for me to be your next Congressman.

If President Trump is going to continue leading America down the path of prosperity, growth, and WINNING, we must TAKE THE HOUSE BACK!

**Will you fight back against the progressive Democrats by voting for me on Tuesday?**
---
|

For God and country,

Kathaleen Wall

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Our hometown team needs your help | | Team, Major League Baseball recently announced a plan to restructure the Minor Leagues and eliminate 42 teams. **Our Mahoning Valley Scrappers are on the chopping block.** [](bit.ly/2TlrdPz) The Scrappers have been a cultural cornerstone of our community for more than 20 years. Their games are a great source of family fun and an affordable way for people of all ages to fall in love with our national pastime. **We need to show the MLB how much these Minor League teams mean to communities like ours.** I've requested a meeting with the MLB commissioner, and I'm leading the fight to keep the Scrappers in the Mahoning Valley. I believe the Cleveland Indians should have a strong farm system to develop players right here in Ohio, and our community deserves the wholesome entertainment and good jobs that the Scrappers provide. If we rally together, I know we can win. Please follow our campaign on **[Facebook](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb1/5486deaa/3e2b7472/dcb93de/2817253304/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://urlgeni.us/facebook/timryanforcongress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=200219_tr_scrappers&source=200219_tr_scrappers")** and **[Twitter](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb1/5486deaa/3e2b7472/dcb93c1/2817253304/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://urlgeni.us/twitter/timryanforcongress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=200219_tr_scrappers&source=200219_tr_scrappers")** to learn more about how you can help save the Scrappers and **[share my Facebook post](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb1/5486deaa/3e2b7472/dcb93c0/2817253304/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://bit.ly/2TlrdPz?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+share+my+Facebook+post&utm_campaign=200219_tr_scrappers&source=200219_tr_scrappers")** to spread awareness in our community. See you at a Scrappers game, \-- Tim | **[CONTRIBUTE ](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb1/5486deaa/3e2b7472/dcb93c3/2817253304/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-ryan-2?refcode=200219_tr_scrappers_button&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+CONTRIBUTE+&utm_campaign=200219_tr_scrappers&source=200219_tr_scrappers")**
---
**** ****
**** ****

* * *
| |
#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
---

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb1/5486deaa/3e2b7472/dcb93c4/2817253304/VEsB/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=7+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=200219_tr_scrappers&source=200219_tr_scrappers") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2020, and big-money attacks from Trump Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb1/5486deaa/3e2b7472/dcb93c7/2817253304/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=8+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=200219_tr_scrappers&source=200219_tr_scrappers"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb1/5486deaa/3e2b7472/dcb93c6/2817253304/VEsP/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=9+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=200219_tr_scrappers&source=200219_tr_scrappers") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Mike Bloomberg
subject: A campaign of doers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
This is what you've made possible.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1eee6bc56d074fbc9b0caebea74d6e72&_e=sHL1r8Ft4B2lrZrtTNVTGICCfc3RluhLtqQd9scswrepaAPgvQ6w55G1O6KKT7qlSh5hYVJ9JHY9zrPQRTDJXAvFjNT_pmleJLJNGthf87yoYsLYDzcFdApz4w1qnXMd81hkIH9Pv2SQ60GLd_qjfntwfh6z_FD2svGIzVUVcYOPrpIG7S78sc4-P1KdE8I8DzzP5OM5q-qqb5dr5CUitnXTNtExxniq1OcmnfFZIrGOV33jckbMgpoSutQjj6zFytcbjAs1s-1xyGlGAYRaRgDNSULEsZrSGJKW-weokXOJOxSHvrZgjIxvrNbzu7aZ6MNOQjDcVleAJwsD_Zij17svlvcNdwW8IzeAYqliGuZtjLttiQ82UtsEjcIs6QSz) Friend -- The campaign we built together is making history. In just over three months, we've formed a strong, talented, diverse team of people all across the country who are ready to defeat Donald Trump and rebuild America. I've met and talked to voters in more than 60 cities in 27 states -- including many states and regions that other candidates have ignored during this primary. Together we've had more than 10 million conversations with voters since we got started, inviting Americans to join our campaign to bring the country together and get big things done. Thanks to all that you've done to spread the word and rally support, we've steadily risen in polls -- and our momentum keeps growing. Now we face our biggest test. This Tuesday -- Super Tuesday -- almost a third of all the delegates that will decide the Democratic nomination will be awarded. Between now and then, I'll be on the campaign trail driving home our message. And we need all of our campaign's supporters -- whether you're in a state that votes on Super Tuesday or not -- to be out there, knocking on doors, making calls, sending texts, and talking to friends and family and neighbors about what's at stake in this election, and our plans for taking on the big challenges facing America. **Find an event near you and RSVP before Super Tuesday:** [**https://events.mikebloomberg.com**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1eee6bc56d074fbc9b0caebea74d6e72&_e=sHL1r8Ft4B2lrZrtTNVTGICCfc3RluhLtqQd9scswrepaAPgvQ6w55G1O6KKT7qlSh5hYVJ9JHY9zrPQRTDJXAvFjNT_pmleJLJNGthf87yoYsLYDzcFdApz4w1qnXMd81hkIH9Pv2SQ60GLd_qjfntwfh6z_FD2svGIzVUVcYPepGTB2WSQqCKgp2ym6xZ_e2qJ2_7mDzaASQGMxTjsdRNFCqBLv24wVf__N6ofMB9Yl04QHUjjOe_S6ouKqijmMXZRxUNwX-8eLEkqchqS7wDXDgyJJ8aXdu9baTGlZqp7ZpNmrHdCJN4WYlBZGURyLJibaO2l2uwcZh12QO8pfWJPMtSEsd5u-IAqNcEOP3uZiVqgfBbZcFVi0L9EowU1) This is our moment. Together we can win the nomination, take the fight to Trump, and start getting this country back on track. See you out there, Mike
---

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1eee6bc56d074fbc9b0caebea74d6e72&_e=sHL1r8Ft4B2lrZrtTNVTGAHXMAI1_sDLTESwKMCM9xw5Dh2ThWPU1gaFzgKGRkFHZagBGRcYjTwAnvAavTslBkJVbO9pnCvnB0E_AycC0uPFmO17H8tO5mkyxjNVwXlD1ncpR03To652lbHQWc3mtvngAbnTBDRHZyblof47pEf6C0m3INlb3l6rY8wA9gZxAaWtO0lmXDaPkpDuvpP-hzi67GbCLVt7CT_f8G5XCVTQNtedfS0UkjseNrjrDvt6IXQ09pPtAzqkKcjDAv4YLA%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=1eee6bc56d074fbc9b0caebea74d6e72&_e=sHL1r8Ft4B2lrZrtTNVTGKWNu5q3o2-iFHp8BfTJ60rjzS1Y8flD6vZeEi8ELNOI2k_KqcGwKPCAjTc5nOhnmSvvowSaVZdBAFEn-S0JXUGpzQe0wTuN1NCQymK-9hJRSBa3uetqZb4vVlM1R82kpBR8vv33ZjEsUddMm0JcRq9yFY9mC6u3Abfz5Ea1mMnDKjmmfFyR847WT_siqqhAp3XvnBAwRHvzf25OGIijKydS6IDkhcEYwOJGoaAULc2BKHXVQ-GeKRPkrkckH7a3Rg%3D%3D)

Friend, **** **** **** Today is the end of the month and we’ve got a big fundraising deadline at midnight. Unfortunately, **_we’re still $3,920 behind our monthly email fundraising goal_**. Mondaire is out on the doors _right now_ getting signatures to get on the ballot, so we’re counting on this email to close that gap. **_[Will you make a donation now so we can hit our goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1AA/ni0YAA/t.2zo/F2JhOmXrTU-1lM8sXpy_qA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKAQsRpd13tPkpNGBdFfQG5lF6BEgaaNiLfkNYaqT0sID1RTS8n6Lek8KhP2XnrsOubX80GY-2Fg2eQ1lzAZuAp8Nnv3VFID7wdT-2FWb4X0f6LB3xHfeDikh1ysl8caq1x7hULAr5zUiRo6Lz0uD8WsH-2F1gQf9-2BS8oMyXpk4DxKmriXyG-2FRA7o3b6uOJaJQqPW7pcGncK9fqbl-2FudpITf2C-2BycmWsN4uJv1O82atj0LTy0ww-3D-3D/dA5l)_**

Mondaire is spending the day working to get on the ballot, talking to voters and hearing their concerns. It’s 35 degrees in Croton right now but that’s not stopping us from getting out there and making sure everyone has a chance to hear from Mondaire. While he’s out connecting with voters, our team is working to hit our fundraising goal. **_[If you can make a contribution now, that means Mondaire can spend more of his time speaking directly to people.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1AA/ni0YAA/t.2zo/F2JhOmXrTU-1lM8sXpy_qA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKAQsRpd13tPkpNGBdFfQG5lF6BEgaaNiLfkNYaqT0sIJj8zJdGyp5JCBveeX0xxbzoNwUqRetp8F5mAdg0wtY3XeErK37Gh2CWDkhda0NNT3joqR-2BOotfi7SVClgm8DR8akhEuwweP8hnxbcEwprR-2F9MHtHHWihxHnFsECQqF-2BM12VK51Fk789ytHTZ6-2B9lPH0Igrk-2B4Qao-2BWCg-2B6vnayfDqx-2FwrRGXImRHJeQA3x-2FAw-3D-3D/oJoC)_** **_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1AA/ni0YAA/t.2zo/F2JhOmXrTU-1lM8sXpy_qA/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKAQsRpd13tPkpNGBdFfQG5lF6BEgaaNiLfkNYaqT0sIJ3gp7Z3ppaMEWP60kz6-2FFMoSfq9AyCN2S7o8yOmPUr7Mkz0C-2BULnClDtjW0aTk82u8KQbbQoaiyd9vBJK9l61rQ-2FPo4-2Ba9-2FRBwehNvMuZgacP1SWNLjpm7V-2Faw3qbUye43N4GPAwEMBQ7y6bCLeIAelliYbpX2I2Oejx5l2-2FD8td54CXh4cR-2FsdK0pUWqG3Yg-3D-3D/JBXr)_**

| | Friend, The 2020 legislative session is well underway. Last year the Minnesota House DFL put forward a bold, progressive agenda to build a Minnesota that works better for everyone. While some bipartisan progress was made, Senate Republicans blocked action on many issues important to the people of our state. That's what this election is all about. **We need to protect the House DFL Majority, flip the Senate, and build a better future for all Minnesotans.** The first quarter deadline of the year is almost here. **We 're ready for the fight, but it takes all of us.** Will you stand with us and make a grassroots, refundable contribution today? **[Make a contribution->](https://act.myngp.com/el/tNr9VfRjCP4XN2CT57r_3T83ZifHDFhy-BPFRzVPL-c=/XYBFEVb_2oArKPD20bv4M6XNolZastEVo72hycqyFLo=?refcode=022920EOM5)** I am so happy to have you as part of the team. name: Tom Cotton (must see)
subject: Don't miss Pres. Trump tweeting my HANNITY interview
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE
body:
While Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are playing the blame game, President Trump and I are working to hold China accountable. I wanted to share with you my interview from Fox and Friends this morning. | [](http://links.action.supportsenatorcotton.com/u/click?_t=62a450578d3d443d9e24ae604e25bd19&_m=b459b7753b3d48d8baead643026143d3&_e=OGF-qVK8vrMhcikxKALKx84YaJ-7Et2ZApCS-2YGOCS8LNIbuJkEjrIkC3AD5lPubm8u7lcUnzfvVJAgIWiUAF0LKVC2IXMQhboGkKreth3zcJ6kvEuiyUCx2rnKpgQgBUa9dZpqDa5pg4BiM60bEGaoNLSgJZJ2gZn3tiZXo49vvwFIFtoIAg8jMeH3i18SygLYPPno2QzSVXI-CO1GEvzGYheO2jYNcZjfuphOMdfCm88RinbCcnBgQPxZ6AgZeUvGvsap0l3u7SdoOp8Z1aVZJZsHQY62L66Qq2pPVESygH3a5QhRsDk6Fr-_cZbEhVWjaphMgBLlyM5HfDO_dfokQ2e3UNPo9z6ix3JxXyT3ic4aX0pEtIws1TMPn2DR2Z1pbSrMGI0LEF5A0nalQjv8Kcdim2HUZI6tLZvInzp-jrXnfpyWs_NufUk1oUQ4G1G9Das40dGh-gMRxOchGw%3D%3D)

Friends,

I wanted to be sure you saw my interview on _Hannity_. President Trump pinned it at the top of his twitter and [**you can watch it here**](http://links.action.supportsenatorcotton.com/u/click?_t=62a450578d3d443d9e24ae604e25bd19&_m=b459b7753b3d48d8baead643026143d3&_e=OGF-qVK8vrMhcikxKALKx84YaJ-7Et2ZApCS-2YGOCS8LNIbuJkEjrIkC3AD5lPubm8u7lcUnzfvVJAgIWiUAF0LKVC2IXMQhboGkKreth3zcJ6kvEuiyUCx2rnKpgQgBUa9dZpqDa5pg4BiM60bEGaoNLSgJZJ2gZn3tiZXo4-AxLmghwtq7EcLHESTJQOaqdcewDON1z0_O3_EWviws1kX2FWvKDjGS9-wKIwz4ZYEOW8JWgKsIgB3topq4AOTz0n8XWluu1KkNGzsmPiec1UiZMSyXSPpyYqmuAB8n_pHG9WBa0BHXtqhFlJAIQqDU4ehZU6m1NaLtwTY3skB_8f8OpwT5VrbFPENt54SnP_5Lkp4OA0ATswfq3vU4gwDRwGYlZqK8hYfKRQGgYQjig%3D%3D).

President Trump knows I have his back. That's why he's supporting me.

[](http://links.action.supportsenatorcotton.com/u/click?_t=62a450578d3d443d9e24ae604e25bd19&_m=b459b7753b3d48d8baead643026143d3&_e=OGF-qVK8vrMhcikxKALKx84YaJ-7Et2ZApCS-2YGOCS8LNIbuJkEjrIkC3AD5lPubm8u7lcUnzfvVJAgIWiUAF0LKVC2IXMQhboGkKreth3zcJ6kvEuiyUCx2rnKpgQgBUa9dZpqDa5pg4BiM60bEGaoNLSgJZJ2gZn3tiZXo4-AxLmghwtq7EcLHESTJQOaTHklm5CPpzrZG_JBj33fdothZHiqUGgtBpbGdYKezb0ZZj7NQ4Zd6nCTpGMocXwKwMQ36YmtC6y85TJ4Hc4RMKwIisb3VJL3_yWHkglqlJ_1yRB-BvusOZadCVbrhspLEoCCAX33R4O87ONUuFw0y4ytX2QjOL-KV3QPW106yiloFb_3DhMszhdUYk5WkGvsAgG7zJkNzxtiNTvoUiXbEw%3D%3D)

[**PLAY >**](http://links.action.supportsenatorcotton.com/u/click?_t=62a450578d3d443d9e24ae604e25bd19&_m=b459b7753b3d48d8baead643026143d3&_e=OGF-qVK8vrMhcikxKALKx84YaJ-7Et2ZApCS-2YGOCS8LNIbuJkEjrIkC3AD5lPubm8u7lcUnzfvVJAgIWiUAF0LKVC2IXMQhboGkKreth3zcJ6kvEuiyUCx2rnKpgQgBUa9dZpqDa5pg4BiM60bEGaoNLSgJZJ2gZn3tiZXo4-AxLmghwtq7EcLHESTJQOaZ_tnPROn3DNPvNrTHnF3xB2OiWrX3EqI8Btu_2rUP5X3krpV7A-HOHc8yVuEtbwDM9xSRGBfCYci2SJs-koLpBbwcYXqdz2SMf9Fj3RKUvwTwuo8IoXUMivEcUGqFfbxdD1ShLPwmG2kWo5hO6r-hofQHVWAwwEsn7qarxnNZDcgCdz8GWEP-ywThau0MAX8FBFtVaR6AuYhi-vBbsuabg%3D%3D)

I may have ruffled a few feathers, but it's important to call it like it is.

While Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are playing the blame game, President Trump and I are working to hold China accountable.

subject: Trump continues to be a wrecking ball against our institutions

| | Peter \-- since Trump's acquittal in the Senate three weeks ago, he's:
* Fired Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman and Amb. Sondland for testifying truthfully against him.
* Directed Attorney General Barr to intervene in Roger Stone's sentencing, leading more than 2,000 former DOJ officials to demand Barr resign.
* Fired the acting Director of National Intelligence for warning us that Russia is once again interfering in our elections \-- and replaced him with a loyalist who has no intelligence experience.

But according to a recent Emerson poll, 8% of Democrats say they won't vote against Trump if their top Democratic candidate doesn't win the primary. And another 13% say it depends on which candidate wins. If more than 20% of Democrats stay home in November, Trump WILL be re-elected without a check on his presidency. We need to know: | | **Will you vote in November to defeat Donald Trump?**
