name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: a note of gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903b2/55b66746/234a45a8/80fc75e/3703391550/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey just finished sending out some handwritten thank you notes to folks I've met on the road, and I wanted to send you a note of gratitude before February comes to a close. **This has been such an important month for our team, our campaign, our coalition. Here's what I'm especially grateful for right now:** The warmth I'm greeted with on the trail, be it a pizza shop in Springfield, a convenience store in Chelsea, or a town hall in Peabody. The hundreds of new faces we have seen at the State Democratic Caucuses, which have long been an insider's game, coming out to support this movement. The new volunteers who show up at events, week after week, dedicating their time to help us organize, make phone calls, and get the word out for this critical election. The outpouring of support I received during the first primary debate, where 300 people were gathered, holding signs, chanting in the freezing rain, and the reception afterward. And the supporters like you, who read these emails. You take the time to read our message, to take action, to pitch in your hard-earned dollars - it's humbling. It's abundantly clear that we are building something special here - in every corner of this state. And I'm so grateful for your support. **Let's continue building our team, our campaign, our coalition. Together I know we can win and accomplish the change we want to see and deserve.** Grateful, each and every day. clean_body: | "" | | Hey just finished sending out some handwritten thank you notes to folks I've met on the road, and I wanted to send you a note of gratitude before February comes to a close. This has been such an important month for our team, our campaign, our coalition. Here's what I'm especially grateful for right now: The warmth I'm greeted with on the trail, be it a pizza shop in Springfield, a convenience store in Chelsea, or a town hall in Peabody. The hundreds of new faces we have seen at the State Democratic Caucuses, which have long been an insider's game, coming out to support this movement. The new volunteers who show up at events, week after week, dedicating their time to help us organize, make phone calls, and get the word out for this critical election. The outpouring of support I received during the first primary debate, where 300 people were gathered, holding signs, chanting in the freezing rain, and the reception afterward. And the supporters like you, who read these emails. You take the time to read our message, to take action, to pitch in your hard-earned dollars - it's humbling. It's abundantly clear that we are building something special here - in every corner of this state. And I'm so grateful for your support. Let's continue building our team, our campaign, our coalition. Together I know we can win and accomplish the change we want to see and deserve. Grateful, each and every day. name: Tiffany
subject: Let’s talk about the southern border...
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayer dollars
body:
Friends, I grew up here and married a 4th generation Arizona farmer -- so I know first-hand the unique difficulties we face with a farm so close to the southern border. That’s why I decided to run for Congress. **We need a real voice and leader who will fight for _US_ , not some liberal agenda.**

O’Halleran and the Democrat elite are actively trying to open our borders and take away the consequences for illegally entering our country. **T****hey want to give illegal immigrants driver's licenses and “FREE” health insurance -- paid for by taxpayer dollars. **
This is completely ridiculous. Growing up on the southern border, I’ve seen how illegal immigration affects our community and I’m ready to fight back.
Now, I’m asking for your help and support to make sure we take down these radical and dangerous ideas and protect our district.

body:
Gary doesn't have the backing of far-right billionaires like the DeVos family, but he does have something far better:
| | |

Experts from CBS News to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight report a Democratic Senate majority HINGES on what happens in Michigan.

**But the DeVos family and national Republicans are spending _MILLIONS_ to tip the scales in the GOP's favor. And now, recent polling shows Gary statistically _TIED_ with his right-wing opponent. **

We've set a MUST-HIT end-of-month goal of raising $50,000 by midnight. But right now, we're falling $17,200 short. **And if Gary is going to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats, falling short simply won't cut it.**
**In a race this close, every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing: Can Gary count on your immediate contribution to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats?**

name: Booker HQ
subject: This is it, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| We're running out of time. Team, we need your help. Tonight (at 11:59 p.m. to be exact) is the deadline to meet our $150,000 February end-of-month fundraising goal. The latest update we have to share with you is that we're now _71%_ to our goal -- having raised $106,509. _**That means we 're still over $40,000 short of where we need to be by tonight.**_ **It 's becoming clear that it's going to take one big final push to put us over the top. Can you step up now with a donation towards our February goal?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200229_BHQ_20200229-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

---

These end-of-month goals have real implications for how we make crucial budget decisions, such as hiring staff, opening offices, and placing ads. With multiple Republican challengers already running against Cory, we want to be well-resourced as this campaign starts to heat up.
**[We know you can't donate everytime we ask, but it would be a huge help if you can send in a quick donation today to support Cory and reach our goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200229_BHQ_20200229-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
February is a little bit longer this year, so let's make the most of the Leap Day and hit this goal tonight!
Booker HQ
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200229_BHQ_20200229-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fad/5fca0d19/7a3c2606/291d050d/2610480360/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fad/5fca0d19/7a3c2606/291d050c/2610480360/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fad/5fca0d19/7a3c2606/291d050b/2610480360/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fad/5fca0d19/7a3c2606/291d050a/2610480360/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" These end-of-month goals have real implications for how we make crucial budget decisions, such as hiring staff, opening offices, and placing ads. With multiple Republican challengers already running against Cory, we want to be well-resourced as this campaign starts to heat up. "=" February is a little bit longer this year, so let's make the most of the Leap Day and hit this goal tonight! Booker HQ "=" | | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate. This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on "", "", and "". We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "".

name: Tina Smith
subject: I voted!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200229-vote?refcode=em200229-vote&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Hi there, I voted early yesterday and I encourage you all to do the same in this critical election.

[](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200229-vote?refcode=em200229-vote&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")

Our votes will determine whether or not Democrats take back the Senate, hold strong in the House, and have the power to make Donald Trump a one-term president. This will be the most important election of our lifetimes. I mean it.

And it's never been more important to get our message across to Minnesota voters -- especially with Trump and the GOP preparing to dump millions worth of resources in the coming months.

Trump's campaign manager recently told GOP Senators (behind closed doors!) that Minnesota is one of their top targets -- after Trump lost here by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016.

**So, here's what I need to ask of you: Can you please add a donation of $10 or more before our end-of-month deadline at midnight to help us fight back? Trump, our opponent, and their right-wing allies will spend millions against me. We have to have the resources to give them a run for their money.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200229-vote?refcode=em200229-vote&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

I have been traveling the state talking with every voter I can to spread our message, but I'm up against powerful forces on the other side. Republicans spending big money on the airwaves, special interests attacking key Senate races like ours, and a White House determined to flip this state red.

I know we can take all of this on, win, and send a message across the country that grassroots activists like you are more powerful than any super PAC or Republican special interest, but it's going to take a team effort to do it.

**How you respond now will be the difference between hitting our end-of-month goal and reaching the voters we need to win -- or falling short and having to cut back. With our country's future and a Democratic majority at stake, we just can't do that. Please make a contribution now.**

clean_body: | "" Hi there, I voted early yesterday and I encourage you all to do the same in this critical election. "" Our votes will determine whether or not Democrats take back the Senate, hold strong in the House, and have the power to make Donald Trump a one-term president. This will be the most important election of our lifetimes. I mean it. And it's never been more important to get our message across to Minnesota voters -- especially with Trump and the GOP preparing to dump millions worth of resources in the coming months. Trump's campaign manager recently told GOP Senators (behind closed doors!) that Minnesota is one of their top targets -- after Trump lost here by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016. So, here's what I need to ask of you: Can you please add a donation of $10 or more before our end-of-month deadline at midnight to help us fight back? Trump, our opponent, and their right-wing allies will spend millions against me. We have to have the resources to give them a run for their money. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" I have been traveling the state talking with every voter I can to spread our message, but I'm up against powerful forces on the other side. Republicans spending big money on the airwaves, special interests attacking key Senate races like ours, and a White House determined to flip this state red. I know we can take all of this on, win, and send a message across the country that grassroots activists like you are more powerful than any super PAC or Republican special interest, but it's going to take a team effort to do it. How you respond now will be the difference between hitting our end-of-month goal and reaching the voters we need to win -- or falling short and having to cut back. With our country's future and a Democratic majority at stake, we just can't do that. Please make a contribution now. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" I can't thank you enough for being a part of our campaign. Your generosity means the world to me time and again. Thank you, Tina

name: Team Booker
subject: That wouldn't be good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Lots of you are probably glued to the news coming out of South Carolina. While you watch, we have to ask for some help.
#
Lots of you are probably glued to the news coming out of South Carolina. While you watch, we have to ask if there’s any way you can make one last $5 contribution before midnight to elect Charles and defeat Mitch McConnell.
The reality is if we don’t get $1,550 more in the door before then, we’re going to fall short on our end of month goal. That wouldn’t be good.
[**Can you help us out by making a $5 contribution to defeat Mitch McConnell before midnight? Every contribution matters — it all adds up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15577324/164483685/-1744453289?refcode=em20200229-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM0MTAyMi01ODViLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bDXPqhCuLrVCJYY2fRdUxKT--Kl_1k49T7Eav7Dmlac=)
The donations we collect aren’t just numbers on a spreadsheet. Each and every contribution is a statement of support for everything we believe in — from the Green New Deal, to Medicare for All and an economy that works for the 99%.
That’s why these fundraising emails are important. [**Please, if you can, give one last $5 before midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15577325/164483686/-1744453289?refcode=em20200229-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM0MTAyMi01ODViLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bDXPqhCuLrVCJYY2fRdUxKT--Kl_1k49T7Eav7Dmlac=)
Thank you,
Team Booker

name: Teresa
subject: Last chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,
I’m reaching out one last time before midnight because of how important this deadline is to our campaign.
We have a real shot at winning Georgia. And because of our unique position as the only state with both Senate seats up for grabs, what we do in our race could swing the balance of power from Mitch McConnell and put the Senate back in Democratic control.
We must have a Democratic Senate majority — and winning Georgia would likely deliver the White House as well.
So before midnight, can I count on you to make a donation? We need 36 donations in the next few hours. Chip in any amount using this link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gumption?refcode=em022920-2&refcode2=b1611e2f-5c5b-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gumption?refcode=em022920-2&refcode2=b1611e2f-5c5b-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true]
—Teresa
PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Contributions or gifts to Teresa Tomlinson for Senate are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WWVhkapV1EmtIwGkR1tXrw2] . If you would like to unsubscribe, click here [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c5066d0f-0e5b-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74/b1611e2f-5c5b-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTYxMWUyZi01YzViLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_j70qKYnfGjUGupeSlNweqHBZE3DvMxbcXmlekuKq94=&id=100930058&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com] . Thanks for your support!

name: MJ Hegar
subject: I'm reaching out one more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I'm asking for your help.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902e2/7f51f7bc/4d818886/4ef19886/803017296/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter --

I'm reaching out one more time before midnight's end-of-month deadline, and I'm asking for your help.

I know that you care deeply about the things we're fighting for, like aggressive action on climate change, expanding and improving health care, and comprehensive immigration reform. **[That's why I'm asking you, if you can, to pitch in before this critical deadline -- our last before the primary on Tuesday.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902e2/7f51f7bc/4d818886/4ef19885/803017296/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk5MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.3nd__992__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We can't achieve a single one of those things if we don't defeat Sen. Cornyn. And it's going to take a powerful grassroots team, a well-oiled campaign operation, and a battle-tested candidate to win. Only one campaign meets those criteria, and it's this one.

So I'm asking for your help to make sure we win the primary and enter the next stage of this campaign in the strongest position possible to win in November. **[Can you help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902e2/7f51f7bc/4d818886/4ef19885/803017296/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk5MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.3nd__992__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We can win this together, Peter, and I'm so glad you're part of this team.

\-- MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902e2/7f51f7bc/4d818886/4ef19885/803017296/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk5MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1wk?refcode=email_20200229.3nd__992__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: YOU represent our drive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
This is my final email before our midnight deadline. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=aa546407d3ad4d758738045180365a61&_e=dmEQiWfOsNycxlfBletiASUNpbcX1Yw3iQkJI7XD3EwBq7Qj3MaDeDTA0o3nLIjB2nc_-7j5uwu0MWNZqzjcg5YmdRcljdEYkf_vlA6YUqOTwqmi418U4pCOCS_2RzEif_-93EWrkz8eCGn4C3U6YXrVt8EQp8l0ExtQee4tvW0U6aMUpFngIzIftXy0u3RtmMJUWX0fynC1_HYGCNLZvCvZ7bW6wC0kuuMEOmd2pImaLacMA3bCttzg_ZdGlEpai-4gOU6bg8TAC-Y3W1r90gMNJL8vFwZ3ftry7BXSiGNlhd2I-J9XaHD8WUcX_POABzR7Md9XO-B4qeYNg28t8qPLrIBYyNfkDVg89dYG8f3351-w3u_NiJxE4Np5iN88NaATPNDTCFRrv1nbOfbFzRG5GFrgWSJG_4wohVIZKU3zW8NEnpFlDDsr58yUbvThpgo0dve2uUdHSAw65AAkHDXq07llFmDnHPNgunUse3I%3D) This is my final email before our midnight deadline. Will you be on the list of the 300 donors who stepped up to help us flip the U.S. Senate blue? I just need 32 more donations, but if everyone thinks someone else to step up, no one will. We’re so close, and I need to know I have your back in this endeavor. David did not defeat Goliath with just luck, it was skill and determination that helped him overcome his adversary. You represent this campaign’s drive. **[Can you donate just $5 today?](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=aa546407d3ad4d758738045180365a61&_e=dmEQiWfOsNycxlfBletiASUNpbcX1Yw3iQkJI7XD3EwBq7Qj3MaDeDTA0o3nLIjB2nc_-7j5uwu0MWNZqzjcg5YmdRcljdEYkf_vlA6YUqOTwqmi418U4pCOCS_2RzEif_-93EWrkz8eCGn4C3U6YXrVt8EQp8l0ExtQee4tvW0U6aMUpFngIzIftXy0u3RtmMJUWX0fynC1_HYGCNLZvCvZ7bW6wC0kuuMEOmd2pImaLacMA3bCttzg_ZdGlEpa7_2NEmH55E-mbCbvGTsHt5ecfG2IyNo9uAumvZbzyDukxHPrKjgZgkL0Kjyqb6QiysjGjPYVpJSMD9tW-4pYxgNTGOB5zy8zxxa4InWEh9JfmTfGd9CLa2GgDOvahpUeDs8FUuHKsvZjBo7NhlcmkJKFTKcX9gpLj0oOLtrpl38dL29VSVOeAI7sq82qKuxcLkSoB5fbSpdkqxg9DNOI4MNdBxj-u7j_4QudlurJyvqn0xCZ5Xt-qdKSIgMS7cYS)** Thank you,

Wilmot Collins

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. name: R. Warnock (personal)
subject: I'll be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
I'll be honest, friend: I need your help.

We're only a few hours away from the biggest fundraising deadline of our campaign, and I just got some bad news from my team: **If donations don 't pick up right away, we're on track to fall short of our goal. **

Make no mistake: Control of the U.S. Senate is on the line in this race. With my Republican opponent spending millions of her personal fortune to buy this seat and strengthen Mitch McConnell's grip on power, the only way we'll be able to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate is with grassroots donations from people like you.
**Friend, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important: ****[Will you please give $5 or more right now- as much as you can spare - to help make up this shortfall so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk64-fr-op&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
This is the biggest test we've faced so far. And if we fail it, we'll lose the best chance we've got at ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all.

That's why this deadline is so important. To flip Georgia blue and fight back against every last right-wing attack, we need to close this fundraising gap by midnight tonight. Because trust me, this is a fight we can't afford to lose.
**I'm counting on you to chip in right now,****friend:[Please, if you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, will you give $5 or more to help us hit our very first end-of-month goal and flip Georgia blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk64-fr-op&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thanks for standing alongside me in this fight.

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e608/288179be/aa838bc/348ed8f0/3778778994/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.
Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only.
PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

| | I told ya Mitch McConnell could lose his seat AND the Senate. I told ya even _Fox News_ admits he has the WORST approval rating in the Senate. I told ya if we lose New Mexico, Democrats will LOSE the Senate. [_**So what more can I say?!?!**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200229_em_fr_b2_carville_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") My buddy Ben Ray needs 967 more gifts before his end-of-month deadline hits in 7 hours. Can I count on ya to step up ASAP? [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b681/18e32a7f/4e19b958/7b22251c/2027572699/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b681/18e32a7f/4e19b958/7b22251d/2027572699/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b681/18e32a7f/4e19b958/7b222512/2027572699/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b681/18e32a7f/4e19b958/7b222513/2027572699/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b681/18e32a7f/4e19b958/7b222510/2027572699/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b681/18e32a7f/4e19b958/7b222511/2027572699/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

body:
|
---

name: Peters, Gary
subject: here's what we know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Our Senate race is heating up in a way I never could have imagined.
| | |
---
I've got to be honest, Friend: Our Senate race is heating up big time - and as a veteran of competitive races, I'm 100% in to win this thing. But I need your help, and I hope you'll let me explain why.

Super PACs and a dark-money group are attacking me - more than any other Democrat in the entire country. And we just learned that the DeVos family has committed nearly 1 million dollars to defeat me. You read that right: $1 million, just like that.
With Senate control hinging on what happens here in Michigan, the stakes have never been higher. That's why I'm reaching out to ask for support ahead of our campaign's most important goal. **But first, I want to tell you why - now more than ever - it's so important for Democrats to take back the Senate.**
Losing in Michigan doesn't just mean that another rubber stamp for Donald Trump will enter the Senate. It means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington - putting our Supreme Court, the Affordable Care Act and so much more in jeopardy.
**The GOP's game plan is centered around flipping Michigan red, because they know Democrats cannot take back the Senate if I lose.**
I'm no stranger to tough elections. I've always fought hard to win, and I'm all in to do it again. But my hard-right opponent outraised us two times in a row, and recent polling shows us statistically tied.

**With analysts at The Washington Post ranking me as one of the most targeted Democratic senators in the country, missing our goal **_again_**would be another huge blow to this campaign.**
Friend, with a Democratic Senate majority _only_ possible if I win in Michigan, our fundraising is falling $16,418 short of our $50,000 end-of-month goal.

So with Senate control at stake, your donation could be the difference between winning and losing. Friend, I'm asking: **With just hours left until our midnight deadline, will you pitch in? I'd be beyond grateful.**
Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/peters_email](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da89f/5721a3ed/7f79b9d9/efb2040/2540439934/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyOTctZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk297-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thank you,

Gary

| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da89f/5721a3ed/7f79b9d9/efb205f/2540439934/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da89f/5721a3ed/7f79b9d9/efb205e/2540439934/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da89f/5721a3ed/7f79b9d9/efb205d/2540439934/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da89f/5721a3ed/7f79b9d9/efb205c/2540439934/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da89f/5721a3ed/7f79b9d9/efb205f/2540439934/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da89f/5721a3ed/7f79b9d9/efb205e/2540439934/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |
